heading_content_part: Privacy Policy | handyCloset Inc.handyCloset Inc.Privacy PolicyWe (handyCloset Inc.) respect the privacy of everyone using it. Please check the following regarding the use of information in the latest version.[

processing of the photos is done only inside your device.Our apps do not send your photos to the outside of your device.Our apps do not collect face data and do not send them to the outside of your device. Our apps never share them with third parties.[
App advertisement]We are using Google AdMob advertisement. For the

provision to third parties, please check the following page.http://www.google.com/intl/en/policies/technologies/ads/https://policies.google.com/privacyAd distributors may use cookies and ad IDs to display ads.It is possible to limit acquisition of information by the following method.<Android>Launch "Settings" app -> Check "Google" -> "Ads" -> "Opt out of Ads Personalization"<iPhone, iPad, iPod>Launch "Settings" app -> "Privacy" -> "Advertising" -> "Limit Ad Tracking" On[
